title: Guitalele Foundations
description: A comprehensive beginner exercise covering all fret ranges, rhythm variations, rests, and ties in 4/4 time.

notes.description: Third String Open, the Middle C, played for one beat
Third String Second fret, the Middle D, played for one beat
Third String Third fret, note is D#, notice the '#' on the Staff Notation
Third String Fourth fret, the Middle F, played for one beat
Third fret on first string, the high C, played for two beats
A rest, where no note is played, lasting for one beat. Notice the absense of fret and string
Third fret on second string, played for one beat. Also features a tie which connects it to the next note
Third fret on second string, played for half beat. The tie ends here.
Fourth fret on second string, played for half a beat
Another tie, connecting this note to the next note
Fifth fret on first string, played for one beat
Third String Open, the Middle C, played for one beat
Third String Second fret, the Middle D, played for one beat
Sixth String Open, the Low E, played for two beats
Fifth String Second fret, the Low G, played for two beats
Seventh fret on third string, the Middle A, played for four beats
Twelfth fret on first string, the High C, played for a quarter beat
Thirteenth fret on first string, the High D, played for a quarter beat
Fourteenth fret on first string, the High E, played for a quarter beat
Fifteenth fret on first string, the High F, played for a quarter beat
Twelfth fret on first string, the High C, played for one and a half beats
Fourteenth fret on first string, the High E, played for half a beat
